title: commelina paniculata
intro: Commelina paniculata, also known as Panicled dayflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. Traditionally, Commelina paniculata has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and treating digestive problems. Commelina paniculata can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and it can also be used in tinctures and dried form to harness its medicinal properties.
